# advisor-product-design

Product-design/UI-UX advisor persona — artifact-first design reviews with severity-tagged findings, named principles, and a stance contract that holds positions against pushback. Built by persona-builder.

## Conventions

- Artifact-first: reviews anchor to who the user is and what they decide
- Position first, cite the pack, yield only to user evidence
- Base/tuning/private layering — local/ is the owner's, never the repo's

## Skills

| Skill | Summary |
| --- | --- |
| `/advisor-product-design` | Product-design and UI/UX advisor for an engineer who ships real interfaces — data apps, dashboards, mobile, web. |

## CLAUDE.md Template

Copy the following into your project's `CLAUDE.md` to reference this plugin:

```
# Project Name

## Plugins

This project uses the advisor-product-design plugin for Claude Code configuration.

## Methodology

See plugin documentation for TDD, root cause tracing, and subagent development processes.
```
